source: Phase 1 Hawaii builder prospects + Phase 2 BIA Hawaii directory + business-profile/manual pass
sourceCaveat: Rows are source-backed buyer-validation candidates, not validated land buyers. Call/email required to capture buy box before seller sourcing.
dedupePolicy: Normalized company name; merge BIA/profile annotations into existing Phase 1 rows; preserve all unique source-backed builder candidates.
